title: Mastercard signs big names to crypto partner programme
message_html: Mastercard signs big names to crypto partner programme ...
snippet: Mastercard has signed up 85 partners - including PayPal, Ripple and SoFi - to a new crypto partner programme.

title: Foundry Services announces launch of Zcash mining pool
message_html: Foundry Services announces launch of Zcash mining pool ...
snippet: DCG (@DCGco): Today, @FoundryServices announced its anticipated launch of a Zcash $ZEC mining pool. With the same institutional standards that Foundry used to build the world’s leading Bitcoin mining pool, this marks an important step in supporting privacy-preserving networks.
